name: office-pdf
description: Native PDF generation (pdfkit, CJK-aware) + text extraction (pdf-parse) — replaces browser-print HTML fallback

tianshu.name: office-pdf
tianshu.description: Native PDF generation (text/headings/tables/lists, CJK fonts, page numbers) + text extraction for context reading

tools.name: pdf_create
tools.description: Generate a real PDF with text, headings, tables, and lists (CJK-aware, optional page numbers)

tools.name: pdf_read
tools.description: Extract text content from a PDF file for context reading
